---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want to do

The job-to-be-done. Describe the user-facing outcome, not a specific implementation.

## Why it matters

What workflow, integration, or use case does this unblock? Who benefits?

## Workarounds you've tried

Useful for understanding gaps in current behavior. Links to existing issues / Discord threads welcome.

## Implementation thoughts (optional)

If you already have ideas on the shape of the API / UI / wire format, share them. Not required — happy to scope together.

## Would you contribute?

- [ ] I'd open a PR myself
- [ ] I'd help test
- [ ] I'm just flagging the need
